attention1.ptxt: When performing the following procedure, be sure to observe Precautions for Fuel System Service to reduce the risk of fire and personal injury.

attention3.ptxt: Fuel pressure regulator is an integral part of fuel pump assembly.
Fuel pressure regulator cannot be individually inspected.

s1.ptxt: Remove fuel filler cap and set ignition “ON”. Fuel pump operation sound should be heard from fuel filler for about 2 seconds and then stop. Be sure to reinstall fuel filler cap after checking.
If check result is not satisfactory, go to Fuel Pump and Its Circuit Check .
Set ignition “OFF” and leave it over 10 minutes as it is.
Fuel pressure should be felt at fuel feed hose (1) for about 2 seconds after setting ignition to “ON”.
If fuel pressure is not felt, go to Fuel Pressure Check .
